tool_args.label: Pandemic Impact on MTA Operations Note
tool_args.raw_text: All MTA operations, finances, and performance indicators continue to be impacted by the Covid-19 pandemic and the 2021 Omicron variant surge. Prior to the pandemic, subway ridership routinely topped 5.5 million on an average weekday. It plummeted by 95 percent to about 300,000 daily rides in April 2020, while ridership on buses and commuter trains experienced similarly dramatic declines.

payload.claim_text: All MTA operations, finances, and performance indicators continue to be impacted by the Covid-19 pandemic and the 2021 Omicron variant surge. Prior to the pandemic, subway ridership routinely topped 5.5 million on an average weekday. It plummeted by 95 percent to about 300,000 daily rides in April 2020, while ridership on buses and commuter trains experienced similarly dramatic declines.

tool_args.label: Ridership Recovery by November 2021
tool_args.raw_text: By November, subway weekday ridership was exceeding 3.3 million rides on a sustained basis, while the combined MTA services topped 5 million riders per day.

payload.claim_text: By November, subway weekday ridership was exceeding 3.3 million rides on a sustained basis, while the combined MTA services topped 5 million riders per day.

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access Project Award
tool_args.raw_text: Award of $1,905.5 million for design-build construction of the Penn Station Access project to connect Penn Station to Metro-North's New Haven rail line. This extension will transform our regional transportation system by improving reliability, reducing travel time, and expanding mass transit options for everyone. Four new accessible stations will be constructed in the East Bronx at Hunts Point, Morris Park, Co-op City, and Parkchester/Van Nest.

payload.claim_text: Award of $1,905.5 million for design-build construction of the Penn Station Access project to connect Penn Station to Metro-North's New Haven rail line. Four new accessible stations will be constructed in the East Bronx at Hunts Point, Morris Park, Co-op City, and Parkchester/Van Nest.

tool_args.label: LIRR On-Time Performance Record 2021
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR's on-time performance (OTP) for 2021 was 96.3 percent, making it the highest OTP the LIRR has seen since modern record keeping began in 1979.

payload.claim_text: LIRR's on-time performance (OTP) for 2021 was 96.3 percent, making it the highest OTP the LIRR has seen since modern record keeping began in 1979.

tool_args.label: Metro-North OTP Above 97% for Second Consecutive Year
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's systemwide on-time performance (OTP) for 2021 was above goal at 97.1 percent. This marks only the second time since the railroad's founding in 1983 that OTP has topped 97 percent for two consecutive years.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North's systemwide on-time performance (OTP) for 2021 was above goal at 97.1 percent. This marks only the second time since the railroad's founding in 1983 that OTP has topped 97 percent for two consecutive years.
